01 / About

About Me

I am an Information Technology student who is passionate about building technology that creates real-world impact. I enjoy learning modern technologies, solving complex problems, and continuously improving my technical skills.

My primary interests include Cloud Computing, Artificial Intelligence, Data Analytics, Software Development, and emerging technologies. I enjoy exploring how these technologies can solve practical problems and improve people's lives.

I believe in continuous learning, innovation, teamwork, and creating meaningful solutions through technology.

Cloud Computing Artificial Intelligence Data Analytics Software Development Continuous Learning
